Service was not friendly and not customer oriented This experience was really awful and it ruined our vacation mood On Wednesday morning we received a phone call from reception to ask us for checkout Sunddenly my husband and I realized that we only booked for three nights that was one night less than we scheduled We made a mistake and felt very anxious and got worried We explained our situation to the reception lady and asked for another night stay with better price as we booked for the previous days but without any negotiations we got direct negative answer and the price we paid was almost doubled We didn t have any other better choice and had to accept it At the same time the reception lady threatened us to pack our luggage immediately within ten minutes and change to another room otherwise we would get fined around 10 pounds You can imagine how embarrassing it was when we were still on bed at that time We totally understood it was kind of hotel policy but the service was really not freindly and not customer oriented This experience was awful and it ruined our vacation mood By the way the room is very crowded and close to traffic road The breakfast is with limited selection and not tasteful at all The only good thing is the location which is about 5 minutes walk to underground station
Great location from the tube just round the corner nice couple of restaurants close by And the rooms were very nice and very clean Would stay there again

This is definitely not 4 stars hotel 1 Breakfast Not full continental breakfast 2 Room was so old small and ugly furniture unlike what i saw on booking com 3 Room key was so old and huge like a hammer Not sure how 4 stars hotel in London does but i stayed in 3 stars hotel in london just around the corner from this hotel I got better room better service and definitely did not lock the main door I stayed for 7 nights Everytime i got back to hotel They always locked the main door I need to ring or knock the door so hard before someone came out to open for me I never experienced in any others 3 or 4 stars hotel in london locked the main door of the hotel at night This made me felt like stay in Hostel even other hostel doesn t lock the door Oh and such a warm greeting at night from the staff who was telling me with the annoying and angry voice You were intoxicated 2 days ago Definitely not 4 stars hotel   The day shift staffs at reception breakfast and housekeepers were great Location was perfect Near tube station

When we first entered the room there was a sweeter folded on the bed Reception didn t apologise properly and instead said it was the cleaner s who probably forgot it They were doing refurbishments on the room next to us They were starting drilling and working from 8am One of the clean towels had a really ugly brown stain Breakfast was OK in taste but with really limited selection Walls are paper thin you can hear everyone and they can hear you The bed was noisy   Earl s Court station is less than 5 minutes away with access to both Piccadilly and District Circle lines Lots of restaurants and cafes are located near the hotel They had no issues with keeping our bags after check out other hotels in London do so or they may charge you a small fee Complimentary tea coffee was available and restock daily in the room The bathroom was quite spacy odd thing for London in my experience The room basic cheap one was a bit larger than what I expected Probably as big as Kensington Holiday s Inn s executive rooms
Room quite small  Hotel was very well located barely 5 mins from Earls Court tube station hotel very well appointed good decor nice fluffy towels Excellent cooked breakfast

Nothing to complain about   I originally was booked for a studio apartment but upon arrival I was upgraded to a 2bd apartment for free I even stayed 3 extra nights for a total of 7 nights because it was so nice They let me keep my upgraded room for the extra 3 nights at the original price The staff is helpful and knowledgeable The breakfast was enough for my needs they served a variety of breads rolls croissants cheeses meats fresh fruit Greek and flavored yogurts 3 types of cereals juices milk water coffee tea and jams The apartment was clean and HUGE Way more than what I needed it had 2bds 3 couches in the living room a fully functioning kitchen very nice tv washing machine and a bathroom The facilities are a bit worn but this is London You will be hard pressed to find a brand new apartment for this price anywhere The location was the best part it was a 3 minute walk to the Earl s Court Underground access to the District and Picadilly Lines 3 very nice grocery stores restaurants post office gym and so many more little shops and places to eat

We did not like the way we had to enter our room through different doors and stairs as the hotel was actually two different buildings at one Breakfast was toooooo poor and really was no value for money Most of the times we preferred not to eat our breakfast at the hotel Also they had a different option for English breakfast with charge Consider that the first day we asked from the waitress for boiled eggs and she told us that the cost for 2 eggs would have been 3 5 while afterwards we saw that the cost per egg was 1 5 We have paid for an executive room and we had the boiler for hot water inside the room and it made noise during night Even though we had the boiler inside our room we had problem with hot water in the douche as not all the times we had hot water We could not open any windows to take some fresh air when we needed We had to get out of the hotel We had to close the door with the key even when we were inside as it was half broken and if we did not lock with a key the door would open on its own the floor made noise in every step   We liked the location of the hotel however this was not really nice till midnight as you could listen the metro The bathroom was really nice and generally the decoration of the room

I had requested for a quiet room not facing the road or located next to the lift lobby I was given a room facing the road and right across from the main access door to the wing The room has an old latch window when it s shut you can still feel the cold air from outside seeping into the room and all the noise from the road outside It s a reasonable stay for one night   Great location Although the room was small it was clean
No help fixing broken intercom in the apartment for a whole week   Perfect location for a week in London Lots of public transport links and decent restaurants nearby

Just two small concerns the bed was quite hard I travel a lot and this wasn t a firm mattress it was hard My wife likened it to sleeping on a board Secondly bit cramped in the dining room we stayed on a weekday I can imagine at the weekend it would be even more crowded Also a cooked breakfast is available for an extra cost something we would have gone for if we were made aware of it We were halfway through our continental breakfast before we found out that this option was available  Location good for West End as Earls Court Tube Station is very close Hotel very clean staff helpful We stayed in an executive double room which was a good size with a modern bathroom Although our room was at the front road noise etc from outside the building was not too noticeable
Rooms are a little bit small but if you spend most of day outside the hotel then it is not a big problem   Very riendly staff excellent location just in couple steps from Earl s Court station

I didn t like how they told me on the day I was arriving that I owed them more money for the accommodations I had booked We booked a superior 1 bedroom apartment for 2 adults 2 children months in advance I even sent them a note asking for 2 separate twin beds for the kids It was not until I contacted them via email to let them know our flight was delayed did they inform me that I owe them an additional 20 pounds day for the additional child At that point in time I had no choice but to pay it as it was too late to find alternative accommodations In my opinion this was very sneaky and unfortunately it left me with a very negative feeling If you check the booking site it clearly shows the apartment can accommodate 2 adults 2 children   Whatever I had that was nice to say has been overshadowed by their sneaky rip off tactics
We stayed one week in a very nice apartment in the upper floor next door to the hotel The apartment was clean and the continental breakfast was sufficient with enough assortments

The bathroom is weird and very inconvenient Either they forgot to finish the bathroom in Room 201 or the designers decided to trade off guest comfort for a minimalist look in all their bathrooms The bathroom is a smaller than a standard one but I must say a very neat looking one What was strange was that it had absolutely no hooks behind the door or anywhere Neither were there any shelves ledges or towel rods anywhere except for one very short towel rod just behind the WC where 2 extra large fluffy towels were folded several times and squeezed on to this rod This created its own problem but one could live with that So when one was changing or showering there was absolutely no provision for hanging one s clothes or for placing a used towel somewhere for re use One has to either keep it over the toilet seat over the sink or on the floor No exaggerations here Beats me what the management was thinking It was a very big struggle and inconvenience for me As for the shower area the challenge was even worse in the shower cubicle there was not a single shelf or a wall niche to place the soap or shampoo bottle You just have to let all your toiletries share floor space with your feet That s the only way you can have your toiletries with you in the shower I reported it at reception certain it was a lapse during renovation or something like that But I and was very surprised when the very helpful receptionist came back to me after making internal inquiries to tell me that that is how all the bathrooms in Hotel Xanadu were I still think it was an oversight as everything else about the hotel was very good and I really would have liked to make it my preferred hotel in London If not for this inconvemience   Location was superb The hotel s restaurant was very good And the staff were very good too

Elegant gracious comfortable  It s an elegant warm and welcoming place in an elegant residential part of London that is five minutes from Sloane Square and the King s Road They upgraded me to a remarkably large beautifully furnished room with a gas fireplace Staff is lovely and low key It has some wonderfully old fashioned touches separate hot and cold taps in the bathroom sink for example but a perfectly modern shower but is extremely comfortable Like having a house in Belgravia

There are few faults worth mentioning about the Draycott It is a shame however that tea and coffee facilities are not available in room That would be a nice touch and is expected these days Somehow the availability of these in the drawing room at 4pm is not quite the same as having your own   Draycott is a small hotel which prides itself on possessing unique qualities of the British nation many now past It is fusty a little tired and not at all modern but it has a charm which many visitors find attractive It has a loyal following and is in a good location the staff are universally friendly and obliging and they seem to know who you are A wonderful feature is the access to the traditional garden square which is available and you do not even need to cross the street to access it

No tea or coffee making facility Some of fixtures shabby considering cost of room   The property was ideally placed for our visit to the Chelsea Flower Show Staff were friendly and helpful Hotel itself quiet and peaceful despite being so close to shops bars restaurants

Very minor areas for improvements my room is probably ready for a bit of a decorating refresh it shows some signs of stays by many happy guests   I have stayed at the Draycott previously and their warm welcome and attention to your comfort continues to be outstanding I was in London for business and to attend the Chelsea Flower Show and their location is perfect for both They are easy walking distance to the flower show and the tube station is even closer The rooms are comfortable and always stocked with books to read as a bookseller I deeply appreciate this and the food was well done Chelsea and Sloane Square are wonderful neighborhoods for shopping and dining and beautifully decorated with flowers this week in May

the bathroom was a bit small for me and the decoration with quiet a lot of items demands a top notch dust cleaning which was not the case in my room   we can t find a more british place to stay in London this is a real pleasure to get this the crown or Scherlock holmes ambiance with this guest house spirit i will return My room was very big with a coach and a lounge area in front of a fireplace Excellent

There is simply nothing I did not like   The hotel is like home from home I felt instantly at home with its great drawing room its sofas the view over the garden the choice of decoration I appreciated the little things like tea and biscuits 3 4 champagne from 6 7 hot chocolate after 9 Staff was most attentive and polite always with a smile My room was spacious well furnished the bed comfortable the pillows soft The bathroom was extremely clean and looked brand new with proper power shower soft towels and nice toiletries The room had airconditioning which was handy The location could not be better with Peter Jones just around the corner and a 5 min walk to Sloane Sq station Just loved it

The fact that the lift doesn t serve the top floor was slightly awkward with my far too heavy as usual suitcase but staff were there to help me when I needed it so it really wasn t a big deal   Everyone was very welcoming and helpful The hotel also had many nice touches to make one feel very much at home A lot of thought has gone into making this a more personal experience than you normally find in so many London hotels Bravo

The bathroom was spacious with quality fittings but lacked a surface for a toiletry and make up bag so we had to put them on top of the cistern The small shelf over the basin was full of hotel toiletries It would also benefit from better lighting over the mirror and a makeup shaving mirror There was nowhere in the bedroom to do make up The rainfall shower head was lovely but a hand held attachment is preferred by some people and would be a good addition   The Draycott is a very well located hotel and has a delightful personal and comfortable ambience It felt rather like visiting a beautiful home with butler service and the guest name card in the brass holder on the door added to that impression Although some guests may prefer anonymity and I m sure that would be respected Staff were always available pleasant and helpful The room was very spacious and comfortable and overlooked Cadogan garden which guests have access to from the hotel sitting room It was a wood panelled room which would multitask for small meetings rather than a pretty room but very comfortable nevertheless I was too busy on this trip to enjoy a walk in the gardens of their complimentary tea and champagne but I will be back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing was all good  Everything from the warm welcome we got at reception a little gift on arrival of warm cookies and a bottle or called water great way to say hello hotel is absolutely beautiful and the staff are great too the room was amazing lovely view of the river and loved the complimentary boat for the river crossing would 100 stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Drinks were a bit pricey but probably normal price for London and the bathroom was a bit on the small side for my liking   All of it staff were fantastic got a car parking space which is a bonus as it is first come first served room was clean and we had a lot of room in the room itself Shower in bathroom was fab nice to have a decent shower in a hotel and the food was amazing Would recommend the vouchers by a dinning voucher for 25 and get 5 free

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bathroom ridiculously small could barely use toilet and have door closed Using garage was challenging as entry cards didn t work so lots of trips to and from reception  Service at dinner was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The staff were extremely friendly and informative went above and beyond our expectations Was able to check in earlier then stated which was brilliant The free unlimited ferry ride back and forth was a brilliant perk

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Wasn t made clear how easy it was to get the C10 bus directly to the property from Canada Water so we had a very expensive taxi that took us to the wrong Hilton through the Rotherhithe tunnel   The deluxe rooms overlooking the Thames have great views You can also open the windows properly so the room stays cool and fresh Ferry great for getting across to the City and the restaurants

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: unable to get the room i wanted river view with outside balcony  love the hotel stayed before just didnt get the room i was expecting but the staff did try to amend it limited amount of river view rooms with access to outside balcony

Full_Review: Having to queue at restaurant for breakfast  Friendly and helpful staff Comfort Accessibility Facilities Perfect location for use of public transport including small ferry to Canary Wharf and back to hotel

Full_Review: Found room cheaper still no refund through booking com one staff member told me there was no parking on site Bathroom could have been cleaner   Location and ferry great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Unfortunately during my stay I got food poisoning from the hotels restaurant When mentioned to staff they were not very concerned This spoilt my stay   Good facilities and lovely spot rooms were spot on On arrival we were upgraded to a suite

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our door did not lock on its own and we only realised when we were leaving our room to catch the boat Had to ring reception and it took them 25 minutes to send someone up to fix it We had to wait in the room as didn t want to leave it unlocked with valuables in it This meant we missed the boat over the river and also took about 45 minutes out of our day when we wanted to get into London centre for our weekend away   Breakfast was cooked well with a lot of choice to cater for everybody Rooms were clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The whole experience The hotel is over priced for what it is it s not luxury it s a standard hotel with standard rooms and I paid 250 a night for the best room and the room was pathetic   The food was nice but expensive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: At times the lobby was very crowded Restaurant Breakfast was nice but also very busy Navigating the hallways and lifts was a bit confusing wouldn t want to be a little tipsy Location is a bit out of the way but useful for where we needed to be   Breakfast buffet was amazing Room was decent size clean quiet and well laid out View was lovely Ferry was very helpful Staff was very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Couldn t use the dockside bar past 10pm Was told could not make any cocktails as they had been busy that week had no ingredients left Main bar was cramped when we returned to hotel after our meal ended up finishing the night earlier than planned headed to our room a little disappointing to say the least   Lovely room with great featured bathroom abit of a let down old fashioned Breakfast excellent huge choice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The cookie received on arrival The staff were really friendly and helpful One particular bar staff was very friendly and chatty didn t get his name as we met in the lift

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Wifi could be a little hit and miss may have just been my phone though as partner appeared to have no issues   Loved the trip away Very comfy bed good sized room and bathroom lovely view and had a small balcony Free unlimited pass on the ferry to get into Canary Wharf Great variety of food in the buffet breakfast Warm cookie on arrival Overall great stay at the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We had no windows to open making the room exceptionally hot and was expecting a lovely view of the Thames which we didn t have   The staff were welcoming room was lovely and breakfast was very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: It was a littl further out than we thought it would but other than that all good   Staff were efficient views of the river lovely comfortable room with small balcony

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The Restaurant had run out of key ingredient from their limited menu The waitress lied about the sauce on the brisket and the customer service right up to duty manager was deplorable and insulting Having stayed in other DoubleTrees and The Hiltonsurrounding I was horrified The room was not made up and after some hours trying to locate anyone to help I was told I would have to stand there or it would not be done The step into the bathroom has a sign but is still missable owing to the tiling   We were thankful the Blacksmith was to hand The hosts and hospitality should train those at The Hotel They were so good we returned for a family mealife later in the week

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Booking com advertised a room with a view across the Thames I did not get one My view was a brick wall   The helpfulness and courtesy of the staff How quiet it was The ferry ticket and cookies was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The way the breakfast was it was unorganised it was really busy and only one chef cooking and everyone was complaining as they wasn t everything out for breakfast also the sausages wasn t cooked properly they was pink  The views and that it was based on the river the location was lovely and that you could get a ferry from the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Toilet seat was broken in our room which was surprisingly annoying Also we were shown to a table for breakfast went up to get a drink then another couple were also shown to our table which was by the window I had moved things around on the table to try and indicate it was taken however we did not want a scene as it appeared the other couple of ladies did so we moved not very proffessional made it quite uncomfortable   Good location for the Olympic Stadium

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Parking was a nightmare you have to phone a number when you got to the car park so they could lift the barrier but no answer so i rang the hotels reception to be told i had to walk up to reception as noone would answer the number that was left Breakfast was a bit of a sham everything lovely once you finally got it but seemed to be chasing staff constantly to get cutlery juice jams

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The lamp in our room didnt work The satellite cable used to go off and the tv was displayed with no source After change of sheets on our second day we returned to tea coffee stained sheets Staff make you wait a long time even if they don t have any customers to deal with Especially the ones that help around the kitchen Found a fried egg with a hair on it right infront of the chef and she failed to detect it Completely put me off breakfast that day The underground car park seemed very risky as no sufficient lighting also had some young teens running in past midnight which concerned me and my wife For 660 3 night stay I d expect a lot more Compared to 740 i paid for flights and accommodation to Sofitel Dubai last summer this was a 1 star experience The UK needs to renovate the shoddy buildings it s a class below the rest of the world Wouldn t recommend this hotel at all Pay a bit more for something in the city Novotel etc Location is not the best it s about 15min walk from nearest underground and 3 min ferry ride and 9min walk to Canary Wharf station The area itself feels unsafe The hotel doesn t even offer water Me and my wife would take our own bottles at breakfast as the two bottles are finished by the time we get to breakfast around 9am We had a Queen guest room which we upgraded to a better view for 20per night as the others were taken Absolute extortion Room was relatively small The bathroom was a joke The tub and tiles had limescale and the sink was very low and really small Had to wash my hands at the side of the tap because I couldn t lather them directly under it If you try to wash your face water spills everywhere They have a bar across our side of the room Apparently they had a prom night for students Loud music went on past midnight which could be easily heard through the glass like I was sleeping outside Very narrow lift and corridors   The ferry ride to Canary Wharf was complimentary for hotel guests but due to lack of other services we might as well have paid for it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room tired TV unable to face the bed Tiny bathroom Not near public transport Small corridors  really warm welcome with cookies the boat trip to and from the hotel nice bar overlooking the river good breakfast fast check out

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Booking com stated we had a smoking room however when we arrived I had to go out of my way back to reception to get the room changed which they said usually costs 25 pounds  The boat ride from the hotel across the river Thames which was offered free by the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room I booked was a king deluxe and I expected a good view but was over looking the car park not the most romantic of places   Great location close to canary wharf and loved the little ferry

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The internet connection was awful and kept dropping off Paid 8 for a tuna sandwich which was very basic and was worth about 2 We had a powercut at about 10pm which was a bit of a pain   Warm cookie on check in was great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Only thing I could pick fault with is I was hoping for a fiver view on the balcony but sadley we didn t get that You could just about see the river but it was more of a view of the court yard Not that the court yard was dirty or an eye sore or anything but would ve made the trip even better with a Canary Wharf view  Great modern hotel staff lovely and the room comfy Went for my girlfriends birthday and let them know this when I booked When we arrived we were greeted with happy birthday balloons on the bed which was a great touch We then went out round London for an hour or so and returned to 2 beautiful cheescakes strawberrys and blueberries and a bottle of wine and 2 glasses sat on the bed side cabinet with a little happy birthday note from the duty manager What an absolutely fantastic touch and they really were beautiful I thoroughly enjoyed my stay here so modern clean and comfortable and the staff and management really helped make our trip and my girlfriends birthday Will be returning

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Got in late wanted to go to bed and order room service to be told that they had stopped cooking and had run out of everything from the snack menu So ordered take away and the 5 staff on the desk were not even good enough to ring the room to tell me the delivery guy was here They would only give us one room key which was very annoying as my partner went to the bar to get drinks and I got in the bath He asked for a 2nd key and was refused which was most inconvenient Had to pay extra for wifi The bed was very tired and noisy   Good welcome with a yummy cookie Bathroom facilities excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Price of the breakfast and that it wasn t included in the price for the room Too far from the attractions A long walk for the tube station  Clean rooms Friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room service very poor it was a selection of left overs as described by a member of your staff as a result of this we had a processed meat type sandwich cobbled together and a packet of crisps grand total of which came to a staggering 17 00 where as I appreciate room service is expensive by the very nature I would expect said sandwich meal to be all singing and all dancing to coin a phrase This not being the case I would appreciate some form of recompense I shall leave this for you to determine what is fare   Breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The restaurant food at night is very poor and basic and extremely over priced we expected more from a Hilton although breakfast was very nice   The location of the hotel was brilliant and the boat was amazing hotel was extremely clean and the staff where very helpful Lovely to sit outside at night and watch the Thames Lots of choice at breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Better food options for room service after 11pm choice of 9 cold sandwiches All food services closed very early and there is not many options around the vicinity unless you know the area very well   Location for our purpose of Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park Stadium concert Travel to and from stadium was very easy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: they charged a service charge every time I went to the bar for a drink I had to ask for it to be removed It was shocking And extra 1 30 every single time I went to the bar just for service More if you were ordering more than 2 drinks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Comfortable and clean hotel in an interesting location It s not exactly what I would call a boutique hotel though it is large breakfast felt like an all inclusive impersonal no nice touches and there is nothing really special about it The short boat trip across to Canary Warf Pier is pleasant although you do have to factor in more time when going from A to B Sitting outside on the terrace is nice but be warned if you order 2 small bottles of water at the bar to take to your room they will cost you nearly 8 which does include an unbelievable 0 9 service charge Fortunately this was deducted from my bill when I expressed my disgust

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We had a nightmare with the key cards because we was given 3 different cards on 3 separate occasions and none were working We was on the 6th floor so to keep going up and down to reception was very tiring I was calling reception and all they were doing was putting me on hold it was quite frustrating

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: When booking I chose a room with great views of the London skyline Our view was of an estate over the road When I questioned the staff at reception they said that if I had wanted a room with a view I should have contacted the hotel separately to my booking com booking Something which I couldn t have possibly known and which I suspect may be total rubbish   The hotel was in a great location and the views of Canary Wharf are fantastic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Unhelpful staff late allocation of room which resulted in a missed dinner appointment the room should have had Sky TV it didnt the bath was rusty the tiles were stained Used the fact that i booked through Booking com that the room was not correct   Breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The shift leader on the morning of the 8 7 17 during breakfast time should improve her communication skills and attitude towards customers I Had asked the receptionist to have one of the tables cleaned for breakfast and was told it would be done in five minutes The shift leader who was told to do this walked away without any communication whatsoever and l was left standing next to a dirty table for more than 15 mins until I had to look for an alternative seating place She never came back to me untill I called her after breakfast   Allocated Room no 171 The bed was comfortable the pillows were too soft and warning the step sign in the bathroom should also be out side the bathroom in case someone falls down

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room was very warm and there wasn t enough tea and coffee left in the room  Close to the river and had a ferry accross to canary wharf which was free to guests

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The fact that in 2017 this hotel does not provide free wifi puts it right at the bottom of my list I don t want to pay 12 99 per day for wifi and 20 per day for breakfast when there are other hotels in the area that throw both in for free Also I don t want to stay in a room that has air con that has 3 levels Not very cold quiet Not very cold quite noisy Not very cold really noisy It s not cool   Bed comfy Location good for a quick ferry ride into canary wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Very limited food available when returning from the O2 late at night Didn t like the distance from a tube station Felt the Hotel lacked refinements Carpets looked tired Hot drinks served in glasses with no handle so very difficult to hold   We loved being able to sit out by the river in the morning for coffee Liked the ferry being directly available Reception very helpful when we arrived as we were in a rush to get to the O2 Very good breakfast and comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The air conditioning was set at 23 degrees which we were unable to alter and was a bit warm for us   The location was excellent and views from our room fabulous Very convenient to have complimentary ferry shuttle to and from Canary Wharf which allowed easy access to all areas of the city

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: room lighting layout service slow at times tv on wall that could not be comfortably viewed from bed Balcony dirty   Breakfast Buffet fresh omeletes coffee machine friendly staff Comfy Bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Rubbish coffee sachets in room The toilet was adequate in the bathroom but if you were a little large you would find it a problem to sit on and close the door We were ok   Lovely delicious hot cookie welcome Bed very comfortable good air conditioning Excellent breakfast choice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Called on room phone at 5am and again at 8am by somone phoning to cancel their work experience Staff were not particularly helpful and the queue at reception was slow moving

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: A little isolated from the main areas of London because of the river and no bridge around but the ferry makes it up somehow   Former warehouse along the river converted into a lovely style hotel The room is more spacious than the average of London The bed was very comfy The hotels give a pass for the ferry crossing the river to Canary Wharf which is the easiest access to most areas on the city

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Quicker room service had to make a second request for additional pillows when we checked in we were told breakfast was included but when we went down to breakfast it wasn t so that was a bit embarrassing  It was the most comfortable bed we have slept in ever Welcome biscuits Getting there by boat location of the bar having a balcony and a door that opened out onto the balcony

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We didn t have coffee at the hotel However upon arrival we were visibly soaking wet having walked through torrential rain yet weren t even offered a paper towel to dry off

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The air con was not working properly in our room we had to leave all windows and balcony door open over night cause it was pretty warm otherwise  The free ferry to Canary wharf the very comfortable bed the view from the balcony excellent breakfast friendly and attentive staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No fan so was warmer than I would have liked Breakfast at almost 20 for a full English per person a rather hefty additional cost found the bar staff quite rude and disinterested  Lovely room comfortable bed large to

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: First night we stayed on the ground floor and got 5 hours sleep because of the noise of staff at the smoking shelter and a skip being changed at 7 30 am The staff were very rude and not helpful at all with bags and the chafing of room  Nothing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The hotel was very busy At breakfast the restaurant was packed noisy and not well laid out for finding the food Poor bread selection In our double room the duvet was too heavy There was only one bedside table In my opinion our room should have been a single room as there was not enough room for a double bed I wish Premier Inn would open a hotel nearby they are far superior and much better value for money   The ferry boat is an asset

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The taxi service the hotel uses was very poor We booked him to take us to a show which we arrived 35 mins late for and not only that but we had to get our own navigation out on our phones to get him there after a 1 hour transport from the hotel Felt like the gentleman was deliberately driving wrong to get more money our of the journey wouldn t recommend this at all to anyone wishing to get a taxi into the city from here We called a black Cab on the next trip and got where we needed again centre of London for less than the hotel taxi Even the black taxi cabs on the way back cost cheaper to book This was the only upsetting part of this trip   Views at night and free boat to get across the river

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We arrived at 16 45 check in was 15 00 however our room was not ready We had very little time to check in and set off again therefore we had to make do with a temporary room which we had little choice but to accept as we were running a bit late   Good location and Asha on reception was very welcoming and provided useful information

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room was very hot and the Aircon didn t work There wasn t any bottled water in the room either let alone a fridge mini bar   Lovely location overlooking the Thames

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Waiting 45 minutes to be seat at breakfast Then waiting 20 minutes in a que for your full English breakfast and letting what s on your plate already getting cold Clean the rooms before new guests go in Make sure the tv works Have clear signs to show keep quiet after dark Taxi at 1 and 3pm in the car park honking horn is not good  Complementary ferry crossing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The que to be seated for breakfast took a little while likewise waiting at the bar to be served took a while   Loved that breakfast was unlimited with a great range to choose from The ferry pass was an added convenience and the warm cookies on arrival were a lovely touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Rooms were quirky loved the windows with the shutters rather than curtains Outside seating areas were great Food was lovely Cookies on arrival were amazing The free ferry across to Canary Wharf is fantastic Great stay will hopefully be back again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff in the restaurant specifically at breakfast were entirely unhelpful and in more than one occasion rude Breakfast service on the day was poorly managed and despite the lady chef who was a diamond in the rough was frankly awful particularly as paying 200 a night was not close to value for money Extremely disappointing Breakfast experience 0 out 10   Great location staff on arrival and checkout were extremely pleasant and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: TV not watchable from Bed in a very awkward position Bathroom and bedroom very small and we had a king deluxe room not even enough room for two people in bathroom Had a room right next to the lift so heard guests in and out all night No fridge in room to store drinks and London was baking this week   Warm cookies on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Ordered room service late one evening and there was no food left although the guy who spoke to me ended up finding a sandwich which had just gone out of date I was starving so took it and he threw in brownies too free of charge   Staff here are amazing and so helpful Room was beautiful and will definitely be coming back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Birthday tray was organized Wasn t ready and I had to call from the room to ask where it arrived 4hours late The restaurant was booked for outside to enjoy the views couldn t have the table booked as the hotel had booked a private function If i had know I would have gone somewhere else No water available Paid for breakfast for my wife and they were supposed to pass the ticket under the door This never happened so my wife never got breakfast which was paid for Spent 15minutes calling reception until someone answered to complain that we could not sleep as the music from the function was vibrating through the room   Nothing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Air conditioning wasnt working so room was unbearable and didnt get any sleep throughout the night There was no fans that could be provided either Got discounted rate but still paid 150 for one night stay in a room that we didnt get any sleep in due to the heat   Location was great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The price of this hotel for one night was very expensive and when talking to other visitors at the hotel we found that we paid twice as much as they did and they had a two night stay we only had one  I liked the hotel in general

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The hotel was absolutely spotless the room was very spacious and up to date I would recommend this hotel to anyone   The hotel was lovely and the staff where very pleasant and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Very poor quality of accomodation for amount paid for stay Property very dated and requires an update No mini fridge in room which I would have expected for amount paid for stay Also very poor view room overlooked a car park   Comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was a lot smaller then a delux queen room should be I ve Been to budget hotels with a room that size and half the price balcony barely had a river view  Balcony was ok

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The air con did not go below 26 which on a hot day is a nightmare someone said they would look at it but never showed up we saw them giving out fans but they apparently ran our The door which opened to the outside would not lock there was a barrier outside and a small chain inside but anyone could have climbed over and bashed the door open The car park was full so they sent us to one down the road which you could exit on foot right near the hotel but when you had to return to it with your bags you couldn t get back through those doors so you had to walk down the road and then basically all the way back on yourself to the hotel side underground It was narrow and difficult to manoeuvre in a big car and they still charge 16 not 12 like it says on some sites for the privilege Don t stay here if you want to be close to city centre either a long bus ride to the nearest tube stop or ferry ride over to Canary Wharf with a walk to the tube We had a drink in the bar only to find inflated prices and a discretionary 12 5 service charge we went to the bar for our drinks but would have paid the same if we d just sat down and got someone to serve us We found a dirty coffee cup next to our bed though I have to say generally the room was clean and tidy small but fit for purpose I personally wouldn t stay here again mainly because I didn t find it very convenient for getting to or getting around   The outside restaurant bar area is nice to look over the water towards Canary Wharf The communal areas grounds are well looked after and very welcoming Staff are very friendly even if they do forget to come and see you when promised

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We did the reservation via booking com and we had to wait 30min to check in as the reservation wasn t in the system It was a 30C day and we got a roof room with a poor functioning AC very noisy and didn t cool the room at all Overall the stay wasn t brilliant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Air con in room could be better Also nobody answered when calling for room service numerous times   Location and view were amazing Modern look Cookies on arrival are a lovely touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was not at all as depicted by the images it looked wonderful on the pictures river view wide ground to ceiling French doors balcony open and airy reality was a cell with a port hole that would not stay open unless propped with a pen the night was for my husbands birthday linked to seeing Guns and Roses and so was a treat room service Did not answer on three occasions we rang reception who said they would pass on our message and room service would revert to us this did not happen the price of overnight parking was charged at 16 but on booking com stated 12 this was reviewed and Amended I was upset and embarrassed that the special occasion was ruined by poor description of room as I would not have booked if it had been described as it truly was and other services on offer were not actually provided the trip had been planned for six months and turned out not to be the perfect Experience that I had wished for my husband I felt let down by false advertising  Cleanliness

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room was a little dated and located over the front reception where cars and buses were dropping and collecting pasengers   Facilities location Breakfast all very good Staff helpful and courteous

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room s are small for a deluxe The layout of the room isn t great Mirror in a dark corner with no light Drinks at the bar very expensive 26 for two drinks   Rooms were clean staff friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Explain how the parking works as we ended up going through the driving opening when picking up the car as couldn t find a pedestrian walk way  The staffs approach In delivering the best service we ve ever had and to make our stay the best we ve ever had in the uk Thank you so much

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The ferry was excellent staff really nice The terrace was nice to sit out on to relax and have a drink We had afternoon tea on the Friday which was excellent and all the staff were lovely at breakfast especially Sandra who made me my omlette

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Parking we had paid for it and could only park in the farthest car park away which was down the road there was no easy access to and from it   The ferry they provided to get to the other side where you could get to canary warf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The reception staff are very cold unwelcoming really think they are superior to everyone The view was meant to be a city view If looking at the back of the hotel a car park building site is meant to be city Booking com you really need to change your wording The arrangements to get to the hotel also need to be clear If I had known I could travel by tube then jump on a boat to take me to Canary Wharf to then catch the regular ferry over to the hotel it would have saved me walking in what I class as very dodgy areas   Food was excellent both the breakfast evening meal The restaurant staff were extremely helpful polite friendly Especially Dinos Francis The bed was so comfy George on reception was very helpful polite Shame about the other reception staff If it wasn t for the food bed restaurant staff I would never step foot in the hotel again It is only those points that made me give it a reasonable review

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The attention to detail we have appreciated at lower star Hilton hotels was missing on this occasion and we felt there was a complacency that the accommodation was enough on its own A suite for 2 with no bathrobes or slippers a mean amount of toiletries and tea facilities which barely lasted the duration of the stay no virgin cocktails hairs in the bath the tv not working properly and showing other guests details these were the irritating things that detracted from our luxury experience There is also a tendency to over reliance on free cookies which were offered as a panacea to all no substitute for a bathrobe On a positive note we were offered extra towels but this was after a 2 hour wait and 3 phonecalls   The hotel is in an amazing location with a private return ferry service from Canary Wharf which makes you feel incredibly special The converted building is high end and certainly luxurious with stunning views Staff are pleasant Breakfast was excellent and plentiful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: You can t improve perfection   The bed was super comfy and the pillows But more to the point I must mention Sandra Her personality shines and she is a great asset to The Hilton hotel She cooks the best omelettes in the world She makes them just soft and fluffy enough without any raw parts Hilton is lucky to have her Look after her she is an asset to you Also there was a young man Italian who served us at reception He was so demure and a perfect gentleman I don t know where you get your staff from and how you train them but they are the greatest asset to you It doesn t matter how beautiful your hotel is and how much money you have spent if the staff do not reflect it in their personalities I didn t want to leave

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The first room allocated was rear of building on ground floor and dated so I upgraded  I changed rooms from basic standard ground floor dated room to a king de luxe second floor Paid upgrade

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bathroom was quite small in that you had to shut the door to sit on the toilet but who needs a big bathroom   Location staff accessibility quiet and view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bed was really comfy the breakfast was really nice but for me the location was fantastic we were heading to the O2 and it was just so easy would definitely stay there again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The breakfast was awful Queuing to get in and wait was unacceptable The food was hard and warm not hot because it was sitting siting fir us The tables weren t clean or wiped or tidied away on time Really disappointed  I liked the old brick building but unfortunately we didn t get that sort of room that was advertised

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No spa or pool Something for the hotel to consider getting   Very welcoming friendly staff who gave us cookies upon check in clean good location with complimentary ferry taxi then only a short walk to the tube shops and restaurants close by the hotel had a lovely breakfast choice something for everyone rooms were perfect as had everything you could need Park over the road if you have little ones Parking which is of good price We had a great view from our room too x

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Hard beds Rubbish wifi  Location was stunning Staff were all really lovely friendly and helpful Breakfast outstanding Cod with risotto dinner was outstanding

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The location is a little off Beautiful but off The nearest stations Canary Wharf and Canada water are not that close to the hotel In the room we stayed the wifi was just not working for the full trip On booking com it said that we had a city view but that was just a view to a parkinglot   The old monumental building is beautiful Location next to the river has a lot of romance to it The breakfast is good The staff is very helpfull and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was a lot smaller than expected didn t have a river view as requested and wasn t like the pictures   Staff were lovely and the head chef was fantastic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Waited nearly 1 hour for the ferry on Saturday night as ferry staff having a break and not working to the published timetable Bit of a pain with young kids   Staff went the extra mile for us Providing treats for our daughter s birthday Fab breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing  Check in very good nice bonus of warm cookie Ferry service great Excellent service in the restaurant staff very friendly and professional but make you feel like you are getting a personal service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We were upgraded to a king size suite The bed was the most comfortable I have ever slept in the breakfast was superb a thoroughly enjoyable stay Thank you

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing it s excellent  This hotel is amazing the staff are the best the rooms are fantastic brilliant location no need for the tube just take the boat everywhere the beds are soooo comfortable and a warm cookie on arrival it really is excellent I would recommend to anyone and everyone going to definitely come back wouldn t go anywhere else now

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Air coon and the room temperature was difficult to adjust   Breakfast is worth it all Staff and place with the view and the bar is just perfect The staff most of them is great The food is good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: there was nothing I didn t like except the lighting was abit poor could ve done with a light outside the bathroom and more mirrors in the room   The complimentary cookies were the best I personally love staying in places with views and the view was beautiful and the balcony

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We were in a room with a sloped Roof and our window looked directly into another guest room   The staff are super helpful and the welcome Cookie was really good The bar and outside Areas are also really nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: This has been the worst hotel experience of my life The room was small my bed was under a slanted roof only had blind windows the curtains didn t keep the light out and the airconditioning next to my bed was extremely noisy even in OFF mode Even earplugs could not resolve this All this for 263 euro night And under the Hilton brand Hotel not reachable by tube

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: the bathroom was just a tad dated and something was rusty in the shower  The chef was really friendly and accommodating and made my eggs to order All of the staff was really nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Tricky to get to by tube which was stressful after a long train journey Bus was easier but there was no mention of the bus on their website we found out ourselves We arrived in the room and there was only 1 teabag and the shower gel shampoo etc wasn t replaced on day 2 Clean room but it s the extra bits that make a difference   The bed was amazing so comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: when booking stated executive lounge access when arrived we were told that it wasnt included and not available in this hotel asked for room close to family that were also in hotel this was not accommodated either  clean room good choice for breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The location is a bit far from city center Free wifi is only available for members  I could hear the water flow and feel peace by the river view and the bed is comfortable It s quiet at night

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The only thing we missed was a vending machine We arrived back from a concert and had to rush to get the last ferry back to the hotel There was nowhere after 11pm to get a drink and snack to take back to the room A vending machine would be ideal there was one for toothpaste razors etc   The staff were very friendly helpful and efficient Offered an upgrade on a room so we could check in early Cookies on arrival Fantastic spread of everything you could wish for at breakfast Comfy bed and pleasant room Lovely views of London Very good value for money

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Had to inform reception that the state of our bathroom was not acceptable when we arrived They were very apologetic and had it cleaned for us Offered a discount The amount of time it took to get a drink from the bar more staff needed   Staff very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Drink and food prices  Fab breakfast Great room Comfy bed Clean throughout Great location with river taxi there Recommend Would stay there again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We were up in top rooms very hot and air conditioning didnt work plus double bed was against wall so access was a pain Changed room and much morw friendly room but again air con no good  Easy access to travel Free boat across river to access transport routes

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was extremely hot and stuffy The fan was on when we entered but we switched it off as it seemed to be blowing hot air despite the thermostat setting   The room was clean the staff were friendly The hotel is well situated if you need to get to Canary Wharf and they give out complimentary ferry tickets

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bathroom floor could do with having a bath mat or some grip as it was very slippy and my partner would have like some complimentary chocolates or biscuits to go with the coffee and the kettle   Really nice hotel nice staff and a cookie on arrival The boat was great but it was very difficult to get back at night The main bridge was closed and this was out of the hotels hands but keep this in mind if you re trying to get back on the night tube The bed was so comfortable It was very clean and easy to check in and out The bed had been made and we had fresh towels when we got back in We agree with the little signs in the bathroom asking for you to reuse the towels tho

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The Room 342 Apart from the view Really disappointed No sleep first night due to a faulty extraction unit in bathroom Rang reception at 0230h no answer The soap holder on bath not fit properly so fell off Ironing board broke And even ended up watching tv on my my phone as the remote didn t work by the last day Staff very polite full of apologies But for approx 300 it s not good enough for a hotel chain we have always stayed in   The views The bar terrace The ferry crossing was frequent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Smoke alarm covered in room so dangerous told reception but little apology sent to a car park from reception without coin to gain access and room was so small breakfast was poor at first looked a great choice but eggs were not cooked as well as bacon and sausage undercooked Been to many Hilton s but this was the worst Shame as loved the location   Right on the thames

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The communication between the employers could be better but that s just a small detail   We liked specially the view from our room to the river the easy access provided from the hotel with the ferry boat to the Canary Wharf and of course the breakfast was amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: An excellent property living up to the Hilton standards that you would expect We had a Queen room which has a view of The Thames The staff all went above and beyond with their customer service The rooms were spotless as were all other areas within the hotel An excellent breakfast selection with waiter waitress service A nice touch was the free ferry across to the hotel from Canary Wharf included in the cost of your stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We was booked for a Queen room as it was my birthday the staff member upgraded us to Queen deleuxe room which was a pleasant suprise but our friend had a King room and they were both exactly the same other than our friends view was better than ours onto a tennis court Rooms could be modernized  We enjoyed the ferry crossing and the fact it was included with stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The long walk to the car park and then to realise the barrier was closed   Cookie on arrival You changed our room because of a loft room window curtain with no quibble Able to sit in the bar and have a very relaxing drink late in the evening A complimentary bottle of champagne The breakfast was very good value Views for excellent in the room The staff were very helpful especially the lady serving breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Only slight issue was the temperature we had a lovely view of the river however there was a slight draft and the heating on in our room wasn t able to go high enough for our liking however the bed was warm and comfy enough that it didn t hinder our evening that much   The breakfast was fresh with so much variety especially for myself and my girlfriend as vegetarians The staff were welcoming and gave water and cookies when waiting to check in and out three whole experience was perfect

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room had a few oddities There is no mini bar There is an ice bucket ice machines on the ground floor along with two glasses There are no water bottles in the room There is a kettle for tea and coffee though When we wanted drinks we of course consulted the in room menus Ah No drinks apart from tea and coffee on the menu Tap water only How absurd So if you re a fan of ice do stay here and use that very thoughtful ice bucket and maybe even take it down to the bar that the staff assured us was open till 1am but was in fact closed by 12 15 and supply your own ice for what I m sure will be very average mimosas We also booked a balcony room We got a Juliette balcony room with a view of the river But not a balcony Just an open window with a railing in front of it The bathroom was dingy and the shower head cocked to the right The hotel is a maze of corridors When I asked for directions to my room from a porter he explained that there are 6th floors everywhere and then proceeded in telling me a very Homer esque set of directions to the room It was an odyssey to be sure The location is good for exploring the lovely Greenland Docks Rotherhithe and Canary Wharf with free tickets for the ferry but that s all The rest of the hotel is a bore It s average to the extreme and missing so many key features of any good modern hotel that it really feels like stepping back in time Oh wait no There s a very modern vending machine close to the lobby But alas no drinks just condoms and toothpaste presumably for the working clientele who can t make it home because of the late meeting   The location We booked the Hilton because it was conveniently located and we were moving and needed a place to stay for a night

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bathroom could have been slightly better designed as the door was catching the toilet while opening and closing Was a very nice bathroom other then that   Great view across the river and with a direct river boat to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Horrendous evening meal room with no window staff didn t seem to be bothered about food Completely different standard compared to previous hiltons

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The service at the hotel was terrible It was my partners birthday and had arranged the romance package along with my own champagne on ice The romance package was just rose petals on the bed and nothing else they promised For his birthday there was the smallest chocolate thing which wasn t even worth sending up The shower was never a constant temperature It kept going hot and cold We ordered room service twice for drinks as it was a hot day and we had to call up twice to check where the drinks were and to ask for ice and glasses as they only sent bottles Would not stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I stayed at the hotel this bank holiday weekend with my boyfriend and what a pleasure it was The warm cookies on arrival are a lovely touch A MASSIVE thank you to Melvin he was at our every beck and call even going the extra mile of getting us hair spray that we had forgot to pack 10 10 on our stay and would be happy to stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Hotel is cramped delux room is small bathrooms are dated no mini fridge overall I expected more from a hotel like the double tree   View was great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: room far to hot and extra money charged to my card and being charged for a meal not had this being said was rectified by the duty manager  location the breakfast staff were excelkent friendly and efficient

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: 1 we paid for a river view room but got a back room so our room should have been cheaper 2 There was constantly lorries unloading under our room so we got woke up alot 3 our bed was so creaky every time we moved we woke eachother up 4 someone came into our room at 7 30am weird   The free ferry over to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: COULDNT WORK THE AIR CONDITIONING AND IT WAS EXTREMELY HOT THIS WEEKEND  LOVELY ROOM OVERLOOKING THE THAMES ROOM WAS CLEAN AND WE HAD A FREE UPGRADE TO A QUEEN DELUXE WHICH HAD GREAT SPACE BED WAS COMFY VIEW WAS GREAT AND BATHROOM WAS CLEAN LOVED THE FREE FERRY ACROSS THE RIVER TO CANARY WHARF

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Firmer pillows would be nice Didn t sleep well When I go to a B B which is far cheaper you get biscuits and a variety but not here The extra effort is not there There is no ambience Reception were really good even though they initially charged 10x the price It was refunded and as an apology they they gave us free WiFi in the room and a complementary drink in the restaurant Why do they charge for WiFi in the room Also the air conditioning didn t do much conditioning i e Cooling Also noisy and no obvious airflow As for the restaurant food looked and tasted OK but is basically expensive pub food Service was awful Put at a table and then ignored Complementary drinks we argued over that one plus they charge a service charge on top Desert was awful Then they said we had to charge to the room and reception said we should have paid in the restaurant   We have stayed here before so thought we d stay again We were given a free upgrade thank you presumably because there were no standard doubles available Still not really worth the 209 for the room Everything is there the room is very clean we asked and received extra pillows and milk The view over the river is great except for the noisy party boats Free ferry tickets is good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Like Jerry Seinfeld said I don t think you do You see you know how to take the reservation you just don t know how to hold the reservation And that s really the most important part of the reservation the holding Anybody can just take them I entered the hotel late at night to find that the room I have reverted was taken without any notification Im pretty sure they would have changed my fully if it would not have come at all

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Booking stated city view As I arrived at 19 30 I was given a view of the tennis courts and what looked like a housing estate Having called reception I was relocated into a river view as all the city views had gone Staff were very obliging but if you have a particular room type booked it should be honoured   Staff were very pleasant and helpfull

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Wi fi didn t work at all in the room despite being a Hilton Honors member TV was fixed to the wall to the side of the bed impossible to watch without getting a stiff neck  ENORMOUS bed very comfy Good location well served by local buses Complementary ferry service to Canary Wharf Fantastic breakfast Chocolate chip cookie on check in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Surprisingly well located never much of a wait for the short ferry to Canary Wharf and just hop on another boat there to Central London a perfect commute on a hot summer s day The hotel itself is great nice rooms stylish good bar restaurant and very friendly helpful staff I had one problem the air con not working in my room but they kindly upgraded me when it couldn t be immediately fixed I ll be back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Not most convenient for access to city centre first a boat across Thames and then a 5 10 min walk to underground at Canary Wharf   Easy access and parking for car Nice location next to river Good breakfast and decent size room Good friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I loved the staff so friendly and welcoming The bonus was at breakfast where the chef personally introduced herself and we then had the breakfast manager do the same This attention to detail is impressive The boat to the hotel was a bonus and the fantastic views across the Thames to Canary Wharf Rooms were much nicer than I expected

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Had to move rooms as we requested water front view but we got building site Got changed to different room told it would be 20 got home and they have taken 40 not at all happy   Water front view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I could not pick a fault with anything   We had a problem with the signal to the TV Engineer did improve the signal but still not successfully in the end But called down to reception and was moved to another room with a Tv in good working order Nothing seemed to be a problem Would love to stay again Fantastic location too Views amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We paid for an upgrade We have stayed here before a few years ago and chose to return to celebrate our anniversary it may have been a nice gesture to have been given this complementary or maybe to have waived the car parking charge  Loved our room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: You couldn t open the bathroom door without it getting stuck against the toilet the lay out of the room was not good Also the view from our balcony was not very nice we wanted to over look the Thames   The location of the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The hotel was very far away from the centre which was not really well indicated on the site It takes you 1 hour at least to get into town The service of the hotel was ok not great There is no mini bar in the rooms so even a bottle of water is not available The rooms are a long way from the main bar The furniture in the rooms especially the chairs were worn out At the bar we asked for crisps but that was not available only drinks The quality of the breakfast is very poor It is a massa production Eggs and bacon were cooked long time in advance no fresh orange juice and the croissants were no good at all   The setting is nice as the hotel is in an old renovated pack house It is ashame it has all be renovated with cheap materials though

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: My only negative comment were that even though the bathrooms were clean they looked tired in need of a refurbishment  Value for money free ferry taxi pass over to Canary Wharf Free warm cookie on arrival Fab breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Location Good that they provided a ferry service however I get motion sick so the journeys were not great for me We did find other routes to get where we needed to but the ferry was the quickest and easiest way   Staff were wonderful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The ferry stopped at 12 15am which means it was harder to get back when you re in canary wharf at this time  The rooms were fantastic and the staff were very polite and always wanted to help

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Building project going on next door but not too noisy   The whole experience walking distance to Canada Water tube station From here could access all main attractions in London Fantastic shopping at Westfield Stratford Great location friendly staff great food with beautiful views both at night and during the day Breakfast available till 11 00

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: N A can t fault our stay   More of a holiday resort than a hotel everywhere spotless and gorgeous looking Cute little spots throughout the hotel including snug room library with fires and open terrace balcony Staff were extremely welcoming as soon as we stepped through the doors They went above and beyond and catered for every need

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room No view from any window The Bed was rickety uncomfortable The floor boards was creeky The TV was in a bad position Not enough tea coffee making facilities Not what I would of expected for the price I ve stayed in premier inn with better rooms better Beds  The hotel the car parking the staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The payment and deposits could be explained a little better at reception when checking out But this is a very little issue   I have been to many Double Tree Hilton hotels and every single time I have left satisfied with my stay The staff at the reception make you feel very welcome and are always very enthusiastic I was at Double Tree in Docklands and I cant remember her name but a lady at reception did everything she could to accommodate to our needs she even upgraded our room And that little touch of giving us cookies as we finished checking in was nice In addition our room was lovely with the added touch of a balcony to enjoy the views of London Overall we had a lovely stay at Double Tree as per usual

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The fact we only stayed one night   Brilliant hotel the staff were brilliant Cesar Costa who checked us in was an absolute legend Perfect room with a view of the thames breakfast was lovely The whole hotel has a chilled feel we felt right at home Private ferry to canary wharf pier is a great way to travel Can t fault the place at all 100 will be staying here again All for the same price as a Travelodge Loved it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
