Full_Review: The fact my friend got charged twice When we checked in we both payed half each for the hotel so we payed the full price on the first day When we checked out we were told that my friends payment did not go through and that she needed to pay again We advised that she received a receipt confirming payment however we were still told she needed to pay the price The member of staff who checked us out was incredibly rude and very patronising It was out of order especially for a Hilton hotel My friend paid and when we left she phoned her bank who advised that she had been charged twice By this point we had left the hotel so I phoned the hotel and spoke again to the rude member of staff who was again very rude and patronising she said on the phone that the bank were lying and that only one payment had gone through and was adamant this was the case She advised that she would send an email to confirm Once we received this email it contradicted everything this staff member said and advised that it was correct my friend had been charged twice My friend had to make a formal complaint regarding this matter and it ruined my opinion and expectation of Hilton hotels   The bed was very comfy and on the first day the receptionist we had was lovely The birthday treat was a fantastic touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room was a little small although we did have a small outside space which was great bed was very squeaky to even move there was a huge dirty linen bin over filled right out side our door from when we arrived and still there when we left  Restaurant was good value for money breakfast was great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I got lost trying to find my room via the lift I needed because it was down past more rooms which I thought was a dead end   The free boat to canary warf The cookies on arrival The view and balcony Staff very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: It wasn t clear that it would be such a trek to get to the hotel from the tube station It was a good 5 10 minute walk with stairs to from the boat back to tube station A shuttle bus would be better than the boat in my opinion especially if bringing luggage   The booking greeting staff were professional helpful and pleasant The staff in the restaurant were cheerful hard working and quick to bring the coffee when asked The room was spacious clean modern and beds were super comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Rooms were a little tired and the linking doors were very noisy   The whole experience was good The real asset that this hotel has is the boat to Canary Wharf Without this it would have not been half as good a location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff at breakfast just ignored us at greeting desk breakfast lounge was very busy Car park system was confusing which would have been ok if it was explained on check in and check out but it wasn t We were charged a pre authorisation refundable cost without knowledge of this   Lovely views location room very clean lovely hotel building terrace and outside seating area next to Thames Ferry over to Canary Wharf was reliable and great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Initial room was very poor condition small with sloping roof and bed in corner Iron flex damaged lightbulb out and curtains on skylight very frayed Just above face if in bed Room changed without a problem but original room should not have been in use Ferry return finishes at 12 midnight which is very difficult to get back for if at a show in central London   Staff were very helpful and friendly Breakfast was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We upgraded room because bed in queen room was terrible   The staff were very friendly and polite Bottle of water and cookie was a nice touch and tickets for the water taxi

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bar staff were especially slow and seemed a bit disorganised even with a very quiet bar Seemed to be a bit disorganised across quite a few areas bar replenishment of food and booking differences not what I would expect from a doubletree Hilton experience   Breakfast chef was extremely kind attentive and friendly She is a great asset to the company There was a bit of a mix up with my booking at check in once I showed my confirmation this was swiftly amended Great to enjoy some relaxing drinks with friends

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bathroom was a little worn   The staff made me feel my stay was so important to them and there customer Focus was second to none The breakfast was amazing and I must say the gentleman who managed the restaurant on Friday night was so friendly and couldn t do more to help he is an asset to doubletree

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room had not been cleaned upon our arrival There was stains on the carpets and the towels were not clean at all There was thick dust around the bathroom including the bin and window ledge We would not stay here again   nothing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No mirror at dressing table so was not able to dry and style hair with hairdryer or straighteners easily I was resorted to sitting on the floor by the door where there was a full length mirror and a socket just close enough to manage This I consider a basic consideration which is why I marked down on the facilities Also there was not window in the room but there were French doors that opened onto a little veranda That would have been fine but anybody could access that balcony which was outside our room and the neighbouring room Therefore didn t feel comfortable leaving open the doors at night and became a little to hot and stuffy   The hotel was lovely and very quirky The best bit was the terrace was right on the riverside Lovely seating areas heaters blankets and all lit up at night Lovely to have coffee on the terrace in the morning The omelettes that were cooked for breakfast were to die for and a truly excellent breakfast The restaurant was very good and reasonably priced The staff were really helpful and friendly and the hotels surroundings were lovely Would love to return again The ferry service from the hotel was also brilliant with attentive staff and was very reliable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bar staff were very rude Not helpful in the slightest The room service was appalling I asked for two different items on the 24 hour food menu which they didn t have Very limited food menu All they had was sandwiches Which come in a packet No plate provided Over all wouldn t recommend staying here   The cookies on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Had to pay for Wifi in room The bathroom albeit clean and the complementary toiletries slippers were great but the bathroom door would not close unless the toilet seat was up Design error   The view was fantastic from the balcony We were given a complementary pass to use the ferry for our stay to cross the river The room was comfortable and clean The bed was very comfortable which is important The staff were helpful and friendly Received a cookie when we checked in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bathroom was in need of a little updating   Very picturesque London hotel on the river in a converted industrial building Stunning views friendly staff very comfortable room and the breakfast was excellent The complementary river ferry was extremely helpful takes you right to Canary Wharf and the Jubilee line

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No complaints whatsoever  The staff were brilliant and the food first class and I was given a complimentary glass of wine when they heard I was running the marathon which I thought was a lovely gesture

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: On Saturday 22nd April the hot breakfast items kept under the hot lock e g Bacon eggs hash browns etc were not particularly hot   We were there to run in the London Marathon and to support a runner I would like to commend the hotel staff and management on the 23rd April as they gave excellent assistance to our party in extending our late check out when our runner needed treatment after the Marathon This caused our group of 11 to overrun the organised late checkout time as we were delayed in Central London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Would of liked a mirror on the desk by the socket so I could see what I was doing when drying my hair  Very friendly staff lovely bed delicious breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The service was great very helpful and friendly staff the room was comfy with a lot of space overlooking Canary Wharf and the ferry service was a lovely touch too sad to have only spent one night there

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The only issue was that the plug socket next to our mirror didn t work   The staff were very friendly and helpful Bed was comfy and the room was nice and clean Great location as the river ferry is right at the hotel so very easy to get onto northside of the river quickly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Everything exceeded my expectations  Amazing service from the staff who went out of their way to ensure my needs were met The view from our room was amazing and overlooking Canary Wharf and the O2 with the river on one side and a distant view of the city from the other side of the balcony We were offered free return boat tickets from the hotel into Canary Wharf and the breakfast was scrumptious Would definitely return Special thanks to Maria the front desk supervisor who provided an amazing service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: nothing  Premium room was well proportioned great location to all hotel facilities nice large bed Staff were friendly and helpful free ferry to Canary Wharf a real bonus

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bar service could have been better  Friendly staff Excellent breakfast Lovely room brilliant view across the Thames to Canary Wharf great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Midday food and snacks from the bar menu a little expensive but tasted good   Great size room Comfy bed Asked for allergy free pillows and was helped straight away Fab breakfast with even almond milk for my son Fun to use the river boats

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Only hotel I ve been in that didn t have bottles of water in the room I upgraded to a room with a city view but I didn t get a city view  Bed was comfy Ferry trip was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Breakfast is expensive 16 for a breakfast I can t justify that I m afraid after spending 200 for the room rate for one night   Our room was lovely along with the balcony but was overlooking a building site

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The only gripe is that the standard Queen rooms were very small however this did not ruin our stay   The staff were very friendly and helpful The restaurant manager Barry was fantastic and really made our stay special The food was fantastic especially breakfast Rooms were clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I didn t like the fact I was charged twice for my stay on my debit card and I don t like that it s still not resolved and that I m being passed around the houses

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Very dark room frosted windows so couldn t see out and only one opened 3 4 inches Didn t look like luxurious picture shown when booked TV channels very limited with option to be charged extortionate amount to access films Breakfast offered limited options Although location interesting was not ideal for traveling or accessing a shop isolated nearest undergrounds not walkable distance had to get a boat then walk 15 mins to Canary Wharf or a bus to Canada Water   Interesting to be in an isolated location if you want to really get away hotel has nice views across the Thames from the bar Bed was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The first room was very disappointing with rust in the bath and it was dirty all round so me and my partner moved to a second room and that also had rust in the bath Very disappointing trip   The bed was very comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The parking lot was way too small Was given the wrong room twice Air con wasn t working No complimentary water Wifi didn t work   The bed was probably the most comfortable bed I ve ever slept in The view of the city was fantastic Loved the outside area of the bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The wifi in our room was poor The rooms were nice ans clean but we aspected a little bit more for the price we ve paid   Great area and the ferry of the hotel is super handy Ideal to visit London The hotel was clean and the staff friendly The breakfast was fantastic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: my first room had a leak in the bathroom ceiling and I was most unimpressed and requested another room That should not have happened and it was obvious that the leak had been happening for a long time and the room had an odour of mould Most unsatisfactory Full credit to all staff I was upgraded to a better room and all was well Could not fault the reception staff I sincerely hope that such substandard rooms are not the norm for people such as myself who have book online from along way away Australia Tasmania to be exact

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our bed wasn t stable It was on wheels so you couldn t lean on the bed because it would just roll   Great location Loved the decor in our rooms and the view from our room Lovely breakfast and great service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bathroom a little small Smashed my elbow on the door numerous times   Comfy bed and lovely pillows We had a great nights sleep it was almost too comfy We found ourselves not wanting to get up to continue exploring London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Had a king room and the bathroom was extremely small there was maybe a 2 3mm gap between the toilet bowl and the edge of the door I was a bit concerned about the location of the room near the lift shaft and overlooking the hotel entrance yet slept well   Staff extremely friendly and helpful Lovely terrace to enjoy the sunshine Slept very well Cushions were very comfortable Loved the little ferry and the public services to the hotel were good It helped that the bus drivers were also friendly they deserve a thanks I hadn t been keen on Double Tree in the past yet this was a very positive experience so will consider in the future

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Theur was a mix up with our room but the staff were so quick to rectify the mistake and couldn t have been more apologetic and helpful   The view from out king room was beautiful and we had use of the executive sweet which made the trip even more special

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I initially called about 2 months ago to request a higher floor but upon my arrival I was given a ground floor BUT the staff were excellent once I raised this issue and I media tell sought to find me a higher floor with better view I was very happy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: bed really hard n uncomfortable to the point that my partner was gonna sleep on the floor cos her back was hurting from the bed Bar staff very slow in taking food and drink orders and even slower getting them from kitchen to table  good views from the balcony bar staff helpful and polite good location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The size of the bathtub could be better but everything else is perfect   The staff is very helpfull the restaurant is awsome and the place of the hotel is really nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: the corridors and lifts were narrow and made wheelchair use a little difficult but was more than compensated for with the extremely helpful and pleasant staff I was really impressed the each and everyone who worked here  In liked the room size as I am in a wheelchair and getting the upgrade gave me plenty of room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bathroom wasn t big enough for a child let alone an adult bed was not comfy and played my back up it was not in the location that it advertised when I booked and it was not worth the money paid for it Wasn t all that clean and walls were dam and yellow in places Not what you expect from a hotel of the hit on chain  The view from the room was nice and location was quiet

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Amazing staff in every area of the hotel Attentive polite and just happy in general which as a guest is a big thing for me when arriving The breakfast was incredible and the view overlooking the Thames was just as impressive The rooms were clean spacious and the balcony we had was a nice touch My girlfriend and I loved it and the surrounding area combined with the ferry service just topped it off for us We will be back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Great location and excellent staff and customer service Food brilliant and breakfast equally as good Lovely to hop on the complimentary river boat to Canary Wharf Looking forward to returning

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: There was nothing we didn t like about this hotel everything was perfect for us   We loved everything about this hotel the location was perfect Just a very short 5 min ferry journey across the river to all the bars and restaurants The staff were all very welcoming and helpful the room was beautiful and spacious and we had an amazing view It s worth having breakfast too there was something for everyone

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: When we got there at first they couldn t find our reservation and was also told that the hotel ddnt receive any of the emails I sent through booking com making certain requests to make our trip pleasant When we were even calling the hotel before we arrived they kept saying we can t find your reservation so we should call booking com and sort it out with them although I kept giving them the reference This made me really worried wit my partner and thought of booking somewhere else last minute but we thought about the fact that my card would be charged if we ddnt pitch at the hotel Getting there from the train station in canary wharf was a problem the hotel could have at least mentioned they have a ferry that runs every now and again for our convinience but obviously communicating them was hard now we had to take a taxi which cost us a lot We apparently got upgraded to a king room from a double room but to be honest those rooms are small if if were we stayed was the king I wonder how tiny the doublr is For that price the hotel doesn t even have a mini bar just great The pictures of the terrace are what sold me when I made the booking but clearly they were deceptive Looked nothing like what we saw there All in all mediocre standards and service I believe   The breakfast was alright

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Poor non functioning aircon in our original room Beds and bathrooms a little small for a family   We had some issues with our room which were efficiently dealt with by your duty manager Aaron Frank The breakfast choice and quality were superb as we re the staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The fact they tried to sneak in a 11 odd service charge at the bottom of my receipt which I wouldn t usually check   It was unbelievable even ended up eating in the hotel late Saturday night at was very surprised at how nice it was

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Asked for a city view room got one the opposite way facing builders who began working very early in the morning Parking for 2 x night was 24 pound which was ridiculous and the shutter was always open No wifi Overall not a nice experience for mine and my partners 1st anniversary   Complimentary boat to the other sode

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The staff were very professional and accommodating especially as I forgot that I was a Hilton Honours member The food was exquisite and the rooms were very spacious airy and the bed has to be one of the best I ve slept in whilst away on business

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing  It was my partners birthday and the Duty Manager left a bottle of wine and cake with a personal letter in our room This was a kind gesture and made him feel extra special thank you

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Rooms are getting a little tired but you get over this by excellent service from all members of staff that go out of the way to help  All the members of staff are very friendly and polite restaurant staff are excellent and food is great and good value for money

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was very small with no window felt like a prison The WIFI in my room did not work on iPhone or iPad despite several attempts Tried to order room service and was told there was no food left and to use just eat Not the kind of service you expect from a 4 star hotel Paid over 150 for a 1 night stay on a weekday and this was not enough for breakfast to be included

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: How the rooms are very close and you can hear people slamming their door at the early hours so found it hard to sleep The costa stand very slow   The decor of the hotel the staff were helpful the complimentary boat service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No fault of hotel but noisy wedding guests woke us up at 7 am on Sunday morning talking loudly and using hairdryer   Quiet position of hotel as minimal road traffic underground car park at a reasonable price for London Free river shuttle across to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The super king size bed was the comfiest bed I ve ever slept in a d the cookies on arrival were amazing the breakfast and service during breakfast is faultless

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Corridors were clean but could do with having paintwork refreshed  Rooms are clean and a good size Lovely night view of Canary Wharf Staff were really friendly and helpful We needed to get tickets printed at reception and it was no problem Breakfast staff in restaurant were lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The only thing that I didn t like was the room I booked on booking com wasn t the room I got All I would say advertise the actually room customers are paying for as it was a let down for me as it was my daughters 18 birthday and booked what I thought we was going to get for her and didn t get the room shown on there   Nice and quite area

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bed was very squeeky any time you moved it was very loud and noisey and un comfy there was also no mini bar which i thought was strange as the room was very hot would have been nice to have a cold drink and our room looked on to a fire exit which wasnt amazing for viewing would have been nice to look on to the thames   Croissants were extry lovely and loved that there was a starbucks in the hotel staff were very friendly and helpful The ferry accross fo canary wharf was very handy and very easy to travel to A B was an enjoyable stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: How far the hotel is from central london There is nothing going on around the hotel We did not enjoy our break in london because the location if this hotel is very misleading

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: my room was just above the air conditioning units of the hotel so it was a bit noisy especially because i am a light sleeper   The breakfast is great and varied The room was spacious clean and comfortable The staff were very nice There is a free ferry shuttle to the opposite side of the river as well as a free bus shuttle from canada water station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was lovely with nice Thames views and quite spacious Mini fridge in the room Comfy beds Really friendly staff Great selection and choice at breakfast We appreciated free ferry

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Had to wait quite a long time in the restaurant and then when it did arrive it was the wrong food we didn t complain as the wait had already been too long  Beautiful place nice and quite and very friendly staff and comfy beds

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Needs a plug near mirror so she can see herself with the hairdryer etc Step down into bathroom was not good floor could have been lifted We were staying with Hilton as it worked with the ferry and access to the o2 The ferry worked well until Sunday night where we took the river okay to the venue instead of ferry walk underground route on return we were told the river bus would be there for 15 mins after performance we left the concert promptly and we re ahead of 50 plus people and as we re we re on the ramp the boat pulled away we did not realise this was the last river boat and more than this when the river Joan arrived at the HILTON crossing it was to be waiting as the last crossing so we would have missed that as well the only way back was by taxi at a cost of 28 90 this was the only down side to a very good weekend   Bed was very comfortable Room was spacious

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: It did take a ferry and a little walk 20 mins to get to restaurants   The duvet was the best duvet ever still trying to find one like it The hotels ferry service was awesome and the bus stops right at the hotels front door

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Everything was perfect there wasn t anything to not like   All the staff were extremely pleasant and friendly They made you feel welcome from the moment you stepped through the door Nothing was too much trouble We will definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The shuttle service from Canary Wharf following a concert at the O2 was very poor and did not afford customers the time to get from the O2 My Daughter and I were left stranded at Canary Wharf with no option to transport to the Hotel The Police took pity and returned us safely after 2 hours of trying to get back by public transport Hotel staff had no interest when I attempted to discuss the issues the following morning   The breakfast was lovely Nice hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: That weekend my partners parents came to visit us in London And annoying got offered a room with a double bed and two single beds together in the same room When we paid for a family room for 4 Highly think it wasn t worth the money and was also very embarrassing for our inlaws to be going through a difficult time just to get what we paid for Shouldn t be advertising what your not giving So annoying   Went through a lot After changing the hotel room 3 times we had to accept anything

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Going home  The Restaurant manager forgot her name Was absolutely fantastic We complimented her for the wonderful food variety and service So she called out the head chef so we could talk with him A fellow South Africa and absolute gent Lovely hotel Highly recommended

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Curtains would be better as blinds but not a big issue Maybe fridges put in the rooms  Food lovely in restaurant and in a great location aswell Room was available early which was a bonus and we got left a little birthday dessert for my dad in the room ND bottle of wine free of charge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: From when we checked in at 3pm till we left at 6pm to go out we were waiting for the staff to bring us something When we got to the room we asked for fresh milk the robes that were included with our executive room an ice bucket and for the tv and the patio door to be fixed The only good point about this hotel is your maintenance who came quickly and sorted everything no problem Fresh milk for tea was an alien concept only 1 robe ever materialised about 5pm as did our ice bucket Every time we called we were told not our department you need to call This just isn t good enough from a Hilton brand one employee should have taken responsibility and noted down what we needed and then ensured other departments were informed My partner physically went down to reception twice asking for an ice bucket he would have just bought it back up but they insisted on bringing it two hours too late They never admitted they had ran out of robes one was finally bought for me with the promise another was on its way still waiting We hadn t bought relaxing clothes with us as we re planning on just chilling in our robes We never had time to relax as were constantly waiting for the door to go it all could have been solved within the first 30 mins Shabby poor organisation I d have been better off saving my money and staying in a travel lodge   Comfy bed great views from room 546 Actual hotel very attractive looking

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Had to pay to upgrade our room as we were stuck in a shoe box at the back of the building next to a building site Bathroom needed upgrading bed linen falling apart Wifi was only free due to having a Hilton Honors membership   Beautiful view opposite canary wharf IF you were lucky enough to get a river view room Good connection to public transport quiet area of London which was very clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We had no tv or power points from 10 00pm until 10 00am This was very inconvenient The manager did take my phone to charge it for me but that ment I had no phone over night no TVs and no kettle   Liked the ferry

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: when booked the site and hotel never mentioned breakfast so ordered room service which was fine but when it came was told you have breakfast in price but still charged 40 pounds extra because we ordered room service not happy so check you have breakfast in price  bed was good room size excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Was offered a pot of tea with breakfast Ate my breakfast and still no tea Asked a member of staff for tea but still didn t arrive Was offered tea when I checked out but I would have liked it with my breakfast   Loved the complimentary boat ride to from Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: just checked my bank statement and been charged twice for the food in restaurant not happy especially as i questioned the bill at check out requested a room with a bath and they did nt have any Check out process very slow  love the location have stayed here many a time

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I was really unhappy that my room did not have hot water so we couldn t have a shower the next morning for the price we paid for the room I find this really unacceptable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: This hotel cost me a lot of money and it was for a special occasion The pictures advertised and the price gave me the impression that my partner and I would be in for a real treat Unfortunately this was not the case When we got to our room we were extremely disappointed as it did not quite look like the advertised pictures Also this hotel sells itself on its spectacular views which we were very much looking forward to When we opened our balcony we were in disbelief We had a shared balcony with two doors either side that seemed accessible by anyone The view was of the back of the building and nothing more I personally felt unsafe and thought that the balcony would be better bricked up as there was no view and to reassure safety I felt as though anyone could have walked on our balcony and got in to our room What was also extremely disappointing was the noise level On both mornings I was awake for 6am It seemed from our room you could hear every little squeak and movement from what I presume the other rooms I could hear showers and toilets flushing There was lots of loud banging that was probably people just getting around there room normally but from our room sounded like someone trying to get in to our room We had a terrible balcony and view the room did not match the pictures I felt unsafe and the noise was unbearable which resulted in a very tired frustrated couple that were trying to enjoy a romantic trip I am disappointed as we were very much looking forward to this trip it was meant to be special and for an occasion We are frequent Hilton stayers and expected much much better for the money and from the advertisement   The staff were very friendly and the food was lovely particularly the breakfast The view across the river and the complementary boat were also nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The rooms are tiny but for 100 in London that s not unusual  This was actually a relief to get because of storm Doris all our trains got cancelled and we were forced to stay over We really surprised at the price and how nice it is It really was such a relief

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Would have been better if we could have purchased a snack with our drinks i e crisps or nuts etc at the bar after our returned from the 02 in the evening  The bed and pillows were very comfy location of room was good Was a very easy journey to the 02 by ferry in the evening as well

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our stay ending   Excellent hotel such hard working staff where nothing was was too much trouble The breakfast was lovely and the massive choice the nice lady on the grill was so helpful with any requests The staff in the restaurant were so polite and friendly Oh And the lovely fresh cookies that we were given on check in Excellent location with its own frerry to canary wharf we will be returning later in the year

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: They don t sell bar snacks There is a food menu though but not available really late   The location by the river is lovely The boat over to Canary Wharf is really handy and makes it quicker to get to central London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: layout of the room could not quit see the TV from the bed Iron could have been placed lower in the wardrobe to enable us to use the full hanging space wardrobe would have been easier to access if facing the bed and not enough milk cartons in the room   The ease of traveling into central London Via canary wharf and the hotel atmosphere was amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The images on booking com of the queen size room didn t reflect the actual size of room I got and it didn t look like the photos on the website The pictures made it look much more impressive than it was The room was clean and modern but the room I got was more like a box room and not queen size I wouldn t like to see the size of the standard room Did upgrade to a king and that was much better   The staff were very helpful and the breakfast we lovely A hotel having its own boat is a brilliant idea and the staff on the boat were very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The rooms were beautifully set out extremely clean and was a lovely room to stay in The staff were very welcoming and answered any questions we had Me and my partner had a wonderful time and would definitely return again The staff and the facilities were excellent and I can t fault any of it We had a lovely stay and would like to thank them so much for making our trip so pleasant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: too dark room At Sunday morning breakfast the staff was a mess under organized although there were enough people to manage The process and guest management failed big time Stress test f ailed It was a mess   Breakfast is delicious staff is pretty helpful and nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No wi fi in the room Bath was damaged in a couple of places and rust was showing through Not much to eat other than pub grub within easy walking distance on this side of the river   Free ferry unfortunately the weather was to bad and we couldn t use it this put most decent restraints out of reach

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: There wasn t any bathrobes and one pair or slippers when my partner called they said we do give robes sometimes and got told we d get one which we didn t no mini fridge bar quiet strange no toothbrush or little toothpaste The option of still or sparlking bottled water in the room as a standard not from the menu   The size of the balcony

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: For one night we had a lovely sized bedroom with a riverside view and it was very comfortable The staff were friendly and welcoming It is easily accessible through numerous ways by transport We got the bus and tube which were regular

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room service it wasn t made clear that hot food is not available for 24 hours however they made up by giving us the sandwiches for free   The room was lovely with nice views and quite spacious this is if you get the bigger rooms the normals ones are nice but not great views and smaller This room Was very comfortable clean location was good not far from Greenwich and other desired destinations Free ferry breakfast included overall very good value for money Also very welcoming staff Especially eugenijiz probably wrong spelling

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We had no water available in our room upon arrival or at all We were literally put in the boiler room where it was very noisey and hot The complimentary shampoo and conditioner were hard and non existent The tv didn t work I had booked a twin room but they gave us a double bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Walls were a bit thin Especially when room next door have a party from 2am 0430am  River taxi service from hotel to Canary Wharf was excellent and efficient and hotel was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: the communication with staff that worked there i found was very poor simple questions asked were hard for them to understand or even know two nights cost over 200 pound as checked in was told they rake 50 deposit for each night but was told this goes into bank when leave straight away was not told it takes 5 days noticed on my online banking they had taken payment for hotel and on check out day i had money in my account then i had to contact my bank as i placed a order for online food payment went through then the next day i was notified my order was cancelled as the hilton hotel took 338 00 plus the rate for the two night stay after trying to contact the hotel and to be put through to the right person was a nightmare after many attempts contacting the hotel i asked to speak to the manager i spoke to him and he basically didnt help said he would call back i said if i dont answer could you please leave a message i think its disgusting as its to do with my money noone is interested and still have not heard anything from them i am now fed up of me making all the contact this is just a quick review For experiencing such poor service from hotel staff and to not even get a response back from the manager I will not book to stay here again   first time staying at hilton hotel hotel great great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Breakfast items were missing from room service order and eggs and bacon were poorly cooked plus sausages were full of gristle   Great view and spacious room with comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Cost of breakfast too expensive We went elsewhere for breakfast and got a better deal Also not enough shower gel for two people and water was not hot only warm   Good sized room and comfy bed Room and shower room were very tasteful and clean All of the staff were friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: If I had to find a fault and I am really scraping the barrel here I would say that the view out of our window wasn t the best we were facing out onto the back of some other rooms but as we didn t spend that much time in the room it wasn t really a problem for us   The fresh cookie on arrival was a nice touch as a welcome to the hotel Staff were very friendly throughout the whole stay nothing was too much Transport links to and from the hotel were great we took advantage of the free ferry on a few occasions which took you to within about a 10 minute walk to the Canary Wharf tube stop or there was a bus stop right outside the hotel which took you to the Canada Water tube stop otherwise this particular stop would be a long walk from the hotel Both the ferry and the bus were very regular The hotel was nicely decorated if you have some down time I would suggest popping into the library where you can settle with a book and a glass of wine infront of one of the roaring fires The only meal we had at the hotel was breakfast absolutely no complaints here it was a plentiful and really good quality The toiletries in the bathroom were lovely also Crabtree Evelyn Overall a fab stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: When I arrived it was 3 20 check in was at 3 i requesting a room with a view and told I had this but when I got to check in the Man Behind the Counter told me the room was not ready so our room was moved to a different one as we had to get ready and didn t have time to wait  Free ferry across the Thames

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Uncomfortable bed super hot room with Pathetic window so couldn t sleep Asked for a room with a view of water got room with a view of bins which woke us at 6 30am as they were being emptied

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Service and hospitality was fantastic tasty cookie on arrival when checking in gave a nice welcoming touch Breakfast in the morning was fantastic with loads of choice hot cold Free ferry shuttle across the Thames was very useful as well

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Cold room Ceiling panel fell down in bathroom No mini fridge No water in room   Staff were friendly and helpful Lovely location Upgraded room for free which was a lovely touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing everything was lovely   Room was amazing especially bed the breakfast was lovely with lots of selection and the staff were amazing and helpful even let us print things off and hotel taxi for free as the ferry was off Amazing stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bed room 225 creaked with every movement or roll the tv remote didn t work and the reception for the tv was very poor also the free wifi was non existent Didn t work at all   Staff were very professional courteous couldn t do enough for us clean appearance happy and approachable 10 10

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Tv wasn t working Windows are dodgy as hell it took me Till the next morning to figure out how to open them unless they needed to be closed lol Oops And we didn t get a full body mirror as silly as it sounds And we didn t get a view I spent 120 I work part time and a full time student so yea that s expensive to me Would of thought we d be getting a view considering I booked this room last year Just thought my man could of at least be finished with a hotel view of the canery wharf   They gave us free cookies at the check in desk

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Did request an upper floor room so we got a view as we did pay for a superior room but we didn t get one Room was lovely just wanted the view   The bed was very comfortable the service was outstanding and the cookies on arrival were incredible Very nice breakfast too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Any mineral water on room even on the expensive one Non mini bar Non toothpastes Even reservation was for 3pm and I was waiting for room 40min because was still dirty The last worst thing was breakfast Another 40min waiting I will never come back there   I like the view from my apartment but nothing else

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bed was so creacky Bathroom a little cramt but is still very nice looking they ve had to cut a bit out the bathroom door so it actually closes whithout hitting the toilet  Nice big balcony and good views with free ferry ride across the river Nice bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The tv didnt work properly   The view was lovely decorated nice and very clean the boat ride included with our stay to take us across the river was very good to use the staff were very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The location is the worst location in the whole of London no tube close by Catching a ferry is a serious inconvenience Trying to get a taxi all the was an inconvenience Staff were extremely unfriendly and English is very poor A terrible hotel and completely overpriced My whole experience of London was terrible due to this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was freezing cold But i was given a discount due to the bad heating The hotel needs to invest in triple glazing even if the room is heated there is a draft during cold weather months  beautiful views of the river At night it s magical watching the lights and tatching the tide go in and out But it s definitely a summer hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The view from the room The overall expense for what you get The bed was too stiff   The staff whom were working within the restaurant at breakfast so helpful and very happy Great transport facilities for crossing the Thames

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Wifi did not work in my room the rooms are not correctly labelled in terms of going through the doors to show which direction you should be going That I had to go to reception to pay for room service before I could order Would be better if you could pay as leaving for it   The location of the property and that there was access to Canary Wharf via ferry which was free Food was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Was a bit out of the way is around a 25mimute taxi journey to the west end   Bed was comfy room was a nice size liked that there was a free ferry crossing over the river

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: When booking it did say we were guaranteed a city view however we had a view over the back of the hotel which there was nothing just bins and a place where the hotel staff could smoke Food and drinks were very expensive in the hotel 9 50 for a pint of beer and a can of pop   The hotel itself was lovely and clean with a great view from reception of Canary Wharf over the Thames The room was very clean and spacious We were greeted with warm cookies upon arrival nice touch Parking located under hotel which was good as we travelled in our car Free unlimited use of the hotels own boat to cross the Thames to Canary Wharf we used this quite a lot to get on the tube at Canary Wharf Very quiet area however the tube was abit of a journey Overall a good stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bed and floor boards were squeaky Could hear people through the walls in the room next door   The use of the boat was fantastic it made life easy The views from the hotel were stunning Overall everything was very good Would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Lack of transport links nearby was a little inconvenient however can t be helped Breakfast too expensive   Very spacious and clean room Free ferry to Canary Wharf was really helpful Staff were very pleasant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I didn t like the fact that we didn t get a river view in our room which was promised on the website when I booked the room   The food was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The deluxe queens room wasn t at all what I expected terrible view small room the hotel moved us after 3 rooms to a nice Thames view belived upgraded to a kings deluxe rooms but by this stage the wow factor had gone  The staff were fantastic nice hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The receptionist made me feel slightly uncomfortable when checking in as she kept staring at me   Free room upgrade as our room wasn t prepared in time Free cookies on arrival and close the the boat docks to get across to central London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I loved everything It smells so clean wherever you walk The breakfast was really good and the location is really cool especially because they have their own boat stop and you can get a free rides to and from canary wharf love it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Rooms are tiny we were even given a room upgrade so I would dread to think the size of the normal room we booked The TV was unwatchable due to where it was braced onto the wall Fire alarm woke us up every morning and the cleaners would just walk in   Free water boat to other side of the river was great we booked the hotel as we were attending a gig at the o2 so we were definitely well connected Costa coffee was delicious Bed was comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I booked riverview room got a side room where we could only see part of the river through a small window out  Free warm cookie on arrival helpful staff beautiful room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The heater in my room was broke and they tried to fix it three times but still it turned itself off My room was cold so I couldn t really relax during my stay because of the low temperature  Very good food Good Bed Fantastic view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: A few stains hairs around the room and a lot of left over food plates etc in hall ways The TV barely worked   Friendly and Helpful Staff Staff Location Comfort of bed Warm cookies on arrival and the breakfast Easy to travel around London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The hotel was clean very well located and the staff were friendly I would not hesitate to recommend the hotel to friends and family Would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The staff were more than happy to help and the free upgrade made our stay even more special I would definitely come back and recommend it as a top place to stay to every single one of my friends and family

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Felt abit awkward when we went for breakfast and a staff member had mentioned to the worker that sat us down that she was saving the table for her guests We heard all she had said and it left us feeling uncomfortable Also our morning shower was too cold   The location and view and free ferry was great and staff were happy to help when we kept getting lost around the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bed was a small double not a large one as stated when booking  Location of the hotel was lovely would be nice in the summer months the menu for the 3 course meal deal off wowcher was extremely good for the price paid

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The staff could have been more helpful I didn t have a great experience as the staff just were not interested in us We had a few problems with the location of the hotel as the nearest tube station is 20 25 minutes walk away The food drinks were extremely overpriced I wouldn t recommend eating drinking there   The room was massive felt more like an appartment than a hotel room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The staff are so friendly there is always someone around to ask if you need anything The beds are so comfy its like sleeping in a bed of feathers and as for the breakfast i couldt fault it they offer a wide range of breakfasts to suit everyone i had the full english with a cup of tea i couldnt say a bad thing about this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Service in the Kaliedescope bar was not great Long delay and then they had forgotten our starters and the main meal was not hot enough Very disappointing in relation to the rest of our stay   Very nice hotel with excellent boat service to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Being on the ground floor of the hotel and not being able to turn the heating off My room was very hot and I found it hard to sleep   The river view and taking the ferry at the hotel s dock

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Was some rubbish noted under chair from previous guest but staff were really apologetic and dealt with house keeping appropriately  My wife s 60th birthday room decorated with confetti cakes etc

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Photos were very deceiving Toilet was so small the door rubbed against the toilet seat Also was impossible to work the tv as no remote Whilst looking for remote found sex coupons which was funny but 100 not meant to be there   Bed was comfortable and everything very clean Staff were also very kind and help was easy to get through the care line Complimentary ferry crossing was also very helpful and the staff were happy to give us directions

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I am so appalled with what experience I had and will be calling directly Booking com or the hotel to better my understanding of what has happened to me over the night at this hotel   The staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The location was slightly out of the way but a good local TFL bus service with a very helpful driver who confirmed when the location had been reached   Welcome at reception Nice room with comfortable bed Nice detail for room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room could ve been bigger but it was just enough space for 2 for a short time Would ve liked a pool table in the bar area   Room was kept very clean and tidy for us cookies at reception were incredible a very nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I didn t enjoy the room itself as it wasn t the same room as depicted in the photos on booking com the room had a lack of plugs meaning we had to switch between charging devices the television had a slow response time and poor choice the room itself didn t contain a fridge which would have been useful as maintaining food was difficult the balcony wasn t great either it was just a door that opened to a walkway so the view was awful   The bathroom was large and the shower was efficient and we also enjoyed the decor of the hotel as it was very picturesque

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: 1 It is expected to add a provisional 50 per day on account of potential expenses so 4 nights would have 200 added towards it I did not accept it as it is not mandatory and I knew I would not spend anything extra but it is presumed not to be queried I have been to other hotels with the same category and this provisional 50 day was not ever mentioned 2 I could not have a hot shower as the water was barely tepid 3 On the A la Carte menu there is no mention that the price for each course DOES NOT include the VAT plus a service charge so a meal that would have been 21 adding up the prices shown on the menu becomes 27 95 3 50 Also the printed bill expects the customer to also add a tip on top of it 4 The booklet in the room should mention that if there is an early start when checking out the staff can prepare some breakfast to take away This same booklet does not say on Saturdays breakfast will not start till 7 00 instead of the usual 06 30 Consequently I left without my breakfast which I had paid for 5 The WiFi was free but very poor 6 I did put a good for staff because the restaurant staff made up for it Some staff I dealt with at reception were not as efficient Unfortunately the negatives outweigh the positives therefore I shall not return to this hotel   There was a wide variety for breakfast It is a good policy to have a complimentary ferry service to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The step from the bathroom kept stubbing toes Kettle didn t turn off when boiled Broken socket by bed Didn t get our free cookies  Bed Massive and so comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I feel the room was very over priced for what it was the bed was shoved in the corner of the room we had no view of the surroundings out of the window the curtains were worn dated not good value for money at all 129 for one nights stay without breakfast I could understand if we were staying near central London but this isnt  easy location to gain access to tube station by free river taxi provided by the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Squeaky bed Arrived early to drop bags was given the option to take a room without river view now or wait on room with river view waited and still didn t get river view room Cold shower in the morning   Staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Wifi wasn t very good or strong even though it was meant to be included The room was supposed to have a river view but did not   Everything was very beautiful in the room staff were incredibly helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The mattress was hard and the room was cold despite increasing the thermostat to its top temperature The shower head wasn t connected right to the hose so at least a third of the water ran down the tiled wall instead The water wasn t hot enough either possibly an annoying safety feature The guests in the room opposite were noisy and inconsiderate but you can t blame the hotel for that   The pillows were very comfy and the room was nicely decorated The location was nice and a good spot for catching Pok mon

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Level of connection via booking com the request concerning facilities was not received by the hotel   Good connection with other side of the river beautfiul view fast WiFi

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Lighting in room location of mirrors not great for putting on make up  Staff were brilliant soooo helpful particularly when I was checking in and again when I needed a taxi

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Hard to find the hotel if you ve never been before and have only used the underground Next time I ll use the riverboat No tv remote in the room But I did find a great pub down the road because of this Reception was busy so I had a walk round the area   The bed was really comfy The wifi was fast The river crossing was free

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our bed on the first night was very creaky made a noise with every move Not brilliant for a good night s sleep   The setting and the helpfulness of all the staff The breakfast was also excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: It was very cold everywhere very restricted due to having to get ferry to cross over so at night not worth going anywhere I asked for a couple requirments before my stay nothing was met or tried Alwats should advise people before stay about terrace not being open etc any changes that they are in winter

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: not possible to have heating on without fan which was noisy and made sleeping problematic Confusion over whether we had booked a river view room and only received bureaucratic official answers

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Drinks in the bar were too expensive at over 20 for 2 glasses of ordinary wine   Stunning location with wonderful views The ferry over from Canary Wharf is a bit special

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing   I loved the river crossing as we went to the 02 and I have never travelled by boat The restaurant had a lovely view of the river and so did our room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: TV was a little difficult to negotiate but then we are middle aged and not very techi minded   The bed was one of the best hotel beds we have slept in We stayed here on the 25th 26th of December to spend Christmas with our family near by The friendly staff and beautiful hotel made are Christmas special and we would like to say a big Thank You

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The public areas of the hotel including the bar and restaurant were cold all the time Air con vents in the restaurant spoilt the experience Other guests were noticing this problem  Location terrific

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room that I was in it was on the ground floor and when the curtains were open everyone would walk past and see inside the room I really didn t like that at all The bathroom was quite small and the floor was freezing in there Also the car park was way too small as it took me such a long time to find a spot and park my car   I liked how comfy the bed was

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our room was tiny and cramped and I mean very cramped But we got up graded for a small fee to the most amazing room ever Wish I had realised how cramped the first room was going to be x  The room had the most spectacular views I ve ever seen and the staff were so so helpful We missed out on the nice room service at it stopped at 10 30pm for last orders but the reception staff gave us a takeout menu from a different pizza company and bought the menu upto our room They do other room service 24 hours but we wanted more than a sandwich x

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I seriously cannot think of anything   The staff were so accommodating they upgraded us but we didn t have a river view We questioned this and they changed us again The free shuttle service to Canary Wharf was brilliant Used it frequently Breakfast was amazing The staff are so attentive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The heating was a bit loud n tv location not good  For our anniversary we were upgraded the room was made up with balloons n lovely towel creation With wine n strawberries dipped in chocolate Staff were wonderful Thank you again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Breakfast should have a tick list for each item Was given black pudding some may not be aware what this is made of bathroom had no lock TV that was fixed to the wall was at an angle couldn t watch from the bed   The view was nice and the bed was very comfortable Nice cookies

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: There is a free boat put on by the hotel we found this excellent as it was more convenient and you can get off at Canary Warf tube and walk 5 mins and jump on the boat the other option is getting off the tube at Canada Water and walking about 20 30 mins this also isn t too bad but we went to see a show at the O2 which finished late and by the time we got to the boat it had finished it would have been better to hae that boat running longer even for a small charge   The location for us was brilliant The room was spacious and very very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: One towel in our room was dirty and had blood on it which obviously put me off using it All good other than this   The location was fab Friendly staff Wonderful room Delicious breakfast and cookies on arrival And also loved the boat you could get to Canary Wharf saved us a lot of time Great location if you re going to the O2 Arena Will definitely be visiting again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room we had was great but the heating was stuck on high not bad considering the weather outside but after a short time of being in the room it was like a sauna and with no thermostat to lower the temperature   The ferry service across to Canary Wharf was an excellent service If the tide is too low the bus service runs in place The hotel has good parking and hotel staff were very helpful and polite

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Food there is great The rooms perfect Beds are so comfy Showers are good quality Perfect hotel for couples Nice views depending on where you are This is my second time at this hotel and will be staying again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Charged upon arrival and charged when left So all in all a stay that should have cost 242 has cost me 560 Hotel was 109 a night then we were told there was an additional 50 per night for extras So paid 318 before we even got to the room Awaiting the first initial payment to be refunded   Room was lovely for a two night stay too small for any longer though

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: View I was expecting a river view but got hotel entrance on asking I was told there was no way of moving Booking com sold as Tiverton view so was expecting more for 149   Breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I think having to pay 12 per night for wi fi access was extreme to say the least  lovely welcome great room really enjoyed the free boat tickets to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Squeeky floor in bedroom Bar was quiet felt too corporate Great pub on other side of river called the Prospect of Whitby   Reception applied my HiltonHonors to booking upgraded room English Bfast was superb Beautiful Hilton quality bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The toilet was dirty had yellow water The location was not very good either as it is quite far from any local shops restaurants activites etc   The bed was nice to sleep in although it was a hard mattress i slept well

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was small and it felt like we were on a boat We made reservations at the hotel restaurant waited at the bar for an hour and after the hostess seated us in the worst spot next to the kitchen when at least 9 other tables were open no one even came to give us a drink menu or bring water After 20 minutes of no service we left It was a very disappointing experience I ve never left a bad review but I would definitely never come back here   Check in was easy The bar staff were very friendly and efficient The room was clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: As we was attending a concert for a special Christmas treat I asked if we could check in one hour earlier than 3pm we arrived at 2pm but was told the room was not ready and to wait while housekeeping cleaned the room We waited and waited and waited till just after 4pm This didn t give us any relaxing time and went straight to dinner at the pub next door as the restaurant was not open till later Before going to dinner we pre ordered a taxi to go to the O2 for 6pm At 6pm we went to the taxi area to be told the taxi wasn t there and will be around 30 40 minutes till it would be back and the hotel only has one taxi This was very stressful and we dod try to call our own but the other taxi ranks said it would take them about 30 minutes to come to the hotel Our taxi articed at 7 15pm After a very poor start to our Christmas treat once back in our hotel room with two children ready for bed the room was very very cold so tried to turn the thermostat up on the wall but the heating didnt work in our room It was 11 30pm and didn t want housekeeping coming to fix it at that time in the night so it was a very cold nights sleep   We wasn t expecting much at breakfast the following morning but it was actually ok this was the only thing that was nice while staying at The doubletree hilton london docklands

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Air conditioning was a bit noisy Serving staff had a tendency to forget our drinks orders   Lovely room with a view over the Thames Nice food in the restaurant Free ferry across to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff should be more knowledge particularly night shift No free water except first night   Location Bed comfort room amenities breakfast options travel arrangements gym view from Room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bed was pretty small for a queen size We booked with expectations of city views but we got views of the back of flats and the dustbins   The staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: You have to bear in mind it s a conversion of historic buildings and there are some very cold areas where my room was located The lighting in the room was far too low definitely needs to be brighter   Smart hotel that is a free boat ride across the Thames from Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The fresh cookie on check in was a great hit The balcony in the family room was great with the river view breakfast was lovely lots of choice and fresh

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room was small and bed was hard They did offer us a topper as we were leaving so for others this is good to know   Afternoon tea was to die for and they catered for our dietary needs brilliantly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I was late for breakfast breakfast finished at 11am Me and my partner got to breakfast for 10 55 They refused us breakfast even though it was all still out Wouldn t even let us just grab something

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bed was amazingly comfy I slept like a log Loved the black out curtains and how clean the room was Breakfast was delicious and such good choices on offer

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: One of the sockets by the bed wasn t working so had to use socket the otherside of the bedroom Table but no chairs could have done with two chairs to sit on and relax   Room was ok

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: There was an alarm that went off wouldn t stop ringing   Complimentary free cookies at reception free ferry rides for the stay Lovely place

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our bedding was dusty had to give them a good beat down The soaps and lotion they provided were only limited for 1 person Also there wasn t any hand washing gel in the toilet   The bed was super comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Absolutely nothing the staff at this hotel should be proud of the work they do   Amazing Staff Delicious Cookies Tasty Breakfast Cosy Comfortable rooms Beautiful Views Ferry access is extremely helpful Easy check in Free Holding of luggage Amazingly clean Free Wi Fi Overall this hotel was absolutely amazing I find it very hard to find something negative about this hotel the staff were helpful kind and considerate

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: the food is at best old pub like and could be better for this class of hotel and the staff need to correct the faults within the room asap no one repaired the shower the whole of our visit  the location is good with good access to taxi boats and the tube and docklands light railway

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I always use booking com to book hotels and rooms but somehow the Hilton did not have my booking and I had to chase it up several times Very distressful Although in the end I had an amazing experience it would be better if the room had a fridge to store drinks and snacks and it is very silly to be paying wifi at a four star hotel   I had an amazing night at the double tree in the docklands The room was very clean and beautiful with a balcony Staff were very friendly who generously upgraded my room with a kingsize bed A great thing is you get free unlimited rides on the ferry to canary wharf from the hotel A beautiful couples experience would definitely come back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Tv was placed in the worst possible position away from the bed you could not see the tv from the bed Went downstairs to reception to ask for water and i was told u can order room service only for the guy on the other line to tell me ill be charged 5 Terrible experience

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Beds were obviously pushed together to make a double and kept separating so big gap in middle of bed Shower wasn t hot Room temperature wasn t working so it was cold  Hotel was clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room had a muskey smell due to mold on the wall and ceiling also room wasn t cleaned properly before we arrived we found a bottle of water under the fridge which my son managed to drink We didn t find it until the next morning tho

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The hotel Staff very rude to me except Ali and evening manager on the night I checked in Will not recommend this hotel to anyone Waste of money Very very disappointed  The breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I don t agree the room was a superior room To be honest I have stayed in better quality rooms at a Premier Inn We were first put in a twin room by mistake   Lovely location Friendly staff Rooms were clean and tidy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We were without heating on our room and it took 2 and half hours to get any one to try and come fix it Even though we rang three times   Nice view from the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Had a cold shower on the first night then got late too dinner would of like to be a little highter i was in the 4th floor 6th would of been nice  I loved the breakfast in the morning The staff were helpful the view was the bestest view ever one of my favourite hotel by far will be returning

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: There was noise from a boiler all night which made it hard to sleep Not enough shower gel etc for two people  The bed was very comfy and the breakfast lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Paying for parking Room was far to hot even after we got maintenance to turn it off Someone was sick in the lift and lobby and it was still there an hour later It was eventually cleaned up when I complained but still stunk the next morning   Front of house staff were nice Free upgrade Nice breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bathroom is very small A bit desappointed with the uniform of the managers at the Christmas bit short and don t look professional I m sorry I had work at double tree Tower Hill and horlbor and we had a diff type of approach   Samith gave us an execellent service and the bar supervisor had an outstanding customer service when our desert was more than half an hour late Excellent breakfast and staff were amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: WIFI SHOULD BE COMPLIMENTARTY PEOPLE EXPECT TO TURN ON A TAP AND WIFI SHOULD BE READILY AVAILABLE AND FREE  LOVED LOVED LOVED THE BREAKFAST WOW WOW WOW LADY CALLED FRANCIS TOOK CARE OF US

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I was supposed to book a bedroom with good location and views but when we checked in they told us our room was average and we had to pay 20 pounds more for something we were supposed to have Food prices was ridiculous for the quality and amount  Bed was awesome and they gave us free cookies all the time

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Dirty bathroom and lime scale on shower head and live terminals exposed on towel rail heater Poor service at hotel bar in evening   Good location and very good breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The first room we had was nothing like the pictures Room was barely wider than the width of the small double bed and the bed must have been ancient as it listed to one side and creaked every time you moved an inch  When we complained that we couldn t sleep on the bed as it was so creaky they gave us a new room without any quibble

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The sheets smelled fusty and the view was awful not what we were expecting in a hotel situated right on the River Thames Only two towels supplied when we are a family of four  The breakfast was very good and the free ferry added to our weekend adventure in London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The location it was either by ferry or a taxi which in our case was expensive   The staff were the best ever they could not do enough for you The breakfast was amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The only minus side was that the bathroom was a bit tired and in need of re decoration   Staff were all very courteous friendly and helpful Hotel was right beside the Rotherhithe ferry for an easy trip to Canary Wharf Tickets for unlimited crossings on the ferry were complimentary with our booking Beds were comfortable and the room was big enough for our family of 4
